message:
fix: add --force flag to hooks install for disabled hooks (gt-qzwds)

hooks_install.go warned users to use --force when installing a disabled
hook, but no --force flag was defined and installation proceeded
unconditionally. Now the command returns an error for disabled hooks
unless --force is passed, matching the documented behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
